_comment: Investigation for #811: which rank gets knocked/yanked backward -- the front (engaged) rank or a rear rank -- under the same two-matched-100-man-Infantry all-out-attack matchup #797/#802/#806/#814 used, now re-run against the post-#814 rate-limited canonical-slot pairing. Selects the player unit (uid 0) and arms both the soldier-ID overlay (Settings.show_soldier_ids, via #815's new set_show_soldier_ids_session) and the engaged-soldier highlight (Settings.show_engaged_highlight) so a labeled-but-not-amber soldier that visibly separates toward the rear is the tell. Camera holds a wide establishing frame, then eases into a tight zoom on the clash point once the lines are about to meet (past LOD_ZOOM_IN=1.55, so show_soldier_ids actually renders) -- one hold, one eased move, one long hold, per the no-jerky-camera convention.
